titleZh: 新《公司法》资本制度三大变革对股东董事财富管理的影响及对策
titleEn: Three Capital-System Changes in the New Company Law and Their Impact on Shareholder and Director Wealth Management
abstractZh: 以股东、董事个人责任与财富风险为主线，讨论实缴期限、催缴义务、资本维持和治理文件优化带来的连锁影响。
abstractEn: Tracks how changes to contribution deadlines, call-up duties, capital maintenance, and governance documentation affect the personal liability and wealth risks of shareholders and directors.
